task_completion.description: Open the Landsat multi-spectral image in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Product Explorer or main application window shows the loaded product 'landsat_multispectral'.

task_completion.description: Create a binary mask band named 'initial_mask' using the specified expression.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Band Maths dialog shows the new band name 'initial_mask' and the expression 'if band_2 > band_4 then 1 else 0', or the Product Explorer shows 'initial_mask' listed under the product's bands.

task_completion.description: Apply a Minimum 3x3 spatial filter to 'initial_mask' to produce 'eroded_mask'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spatial filter dialog shows a Minimum 3x3 filter being applied to 'initial_mask' with the target band name 'eroded_mask', or the Product Explorer shows 'eroded_mask'.

task_completion.description: Apply a Maximum 3x3 spatial filter to 'eroded_mask' to produce 'cleaned_mask'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spatial filter dialog shows a Maximum 3x3 filter being applied to 'eroded_mask' with the target band name 'cleaned_mask', or the Product Explorer shows 'cleaned_mask'.

task_completion.description: Save the resulting product in BEAM-DIMAP format to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save Product As' dialog or file explorer shows the product being saved as 'morphological_mask.dim' in the '/home/ga/snap_exports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the product as a GeoTIFF to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' dialog or file explorer shows the product being exported as 'morphological_mask.tif' in the '/home/ga/snap_exports/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the geospatial software to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with dialogs, menus, and the Product Explorer in the geospatial software (e.g., ESA SNAP), rather than just terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual geospatial analysis application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window is visible and active, not just a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent performed the required band math and filtering steps rather than just copying an existing file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is visual evidence of the Band Maths and Spatial Filter dialogs being used, rather than just file manager copy-paste operations.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires processing the input file '/home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif'. The expected bands to be created are 'initial_mask', 'eroded_mask', and 'cleaned_mask'. The final outputs must be saved to '/home/ga/snap_exports/morphological_mask.dim' (BEAM-DIMAP format) and '/home/ga/snap_exports/morphological_mask.tif' (GeoTIFF format).
